title: Who Grades the Grader? Co-Evolving Evaluation Metrics and Skills for Self-Improving LLM Agents
paper_release_claim: Appendix H states that code, loops, op packs, split builders, screening scripts, judge protocols, and structured result files are released.

searches.method: full immutable PDF, extracted text, and complete arXiv source-tree inspection
searches.result: No GitHub, Hugging Face, project-page, DOI-supplement, or other code/data URL appears in the paper, bibliography, metadata, or source tree. The arXiv source contains only manuscript sources and figures; it contains no task data, code, run records, or ancillary archive.

searches.method: web search by exact title, arXiv ID, and Double Ratchet system name
searches.result: No verifiable author-owned implementation was found. Search results included the arXiv paper and an unrelated third-party PDF mirror.
The broad query was dominated by unrelated cryptographic Double Ratchet repositories and did not establish an author-owned empirical release.

claim_boundary: The empirical code/data release and end-to-end regeneration claim cannot be audited from publicly linked artifacts found during this review. The review treats all implementation behavior and numerical results as manuscript-reported, while the manuscript source is used only to verify wording and internal consistency.
